title: Platinum box set
wikitext:
[]: Platinum box set             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Thu Jan 03, 2008 3:28 am Its only the show correct? It does not include the movies?

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Thu Jan 03, 2008 4:44 am No unfortunetely. You'll have to look at manga entertainment for the movies, and as most people here will agree, Manga handled them rather shittily.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Thu Jan 03, 2008 5:41 am there both done through mad man over her and there pritty good although I had to travle halfway across the country before christmas to get death and rebirth or illd still be waiting.

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Thu Jan 03, 2008 6:45 am Yeah, just the show. You have to go through Manga Entertainment to get the movies, which I think is rather silly. If I have a boxset of the series, I want the movies. I know why it is done, but ADV should've secured the rights to the movies ahead of time.

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Fri Jan 04, 2008 4:06 am Indigo Arcangel wrote: No unfortunetely. You'll have to look at manga entertainment for the movies, and as most people here will agree, Manga handled them rather shittily.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Jan 04, 2008 4:37 am Razeil100 wrote: Indigo Arcangel wrote: No unfortunetely. You'll have to look at manga entertainment for the movies, and as most people here will agree, Manga handled them rather shittily.
